description: Analyze the 'fells_loop' track to determine its geographic bounding box. Create a list named 'Survey Area' containing four waypoints (NW-CORNER, NE-CORNER, SE-CORNER, and SW-CORNER) at the corners of a bounding rectangle around the track with ~0.002 degree padding. Include a route named 'Survey Boundary' connecting these waypoints in a closed loop (NW -> NE -> SE -> SW -> NW). Export the 'Survey Area' list as a GPX file to C:\workspace\output\survey_boundary.gpx.
